overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a wet futuristic city sidewalk. The scene features overcast weather, towering corporate buildings with neon signage, and pedestrians including a distinctive character with pink hair. The camera follows the player character through the urban environment with moderate traffic visible on the adjacent multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk alongside corporate headquarters

events.description: camera passes close by a pedestrian with pink hair who turns to face the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk following a businessman, approaching a character with distinctive pink cybernetic hair

notable_agents.action: businessman in brown coat carrying briefcase walking ahead of the player
character with pink hair and red cybernetic eye implants turning and walking past the camera

entered.detail: sleek dark metallic building wall with horizontal architectural ridges
glowing white signage with stylized text mounted on the building facade
massive concrete overpass with support pillars spanning across the street ahead
tall glass and steel tower with multiple stacked levels visible behind the overpass

segments.scene_description: The player character walks along a rain-slicked futuristic sidewalk beside a towering corporate building with glowing signage. The overcast morning light creates a cool, hazy atmosphere as the character approaches a distinctive pedestrian with pink cybernetic hair. Traffic moves along the multi-lane road to the right while the massive elevated highway structure looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk approaching pedestrian group under overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the pink-haired character, approaching a pedestrian holding a large umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a large dark umbrella walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large dark colored umbrella held by pedestrian ahead on the sidewalk
tall vertical pole with glowing green digital text display showing information

segments.scene_description: Having passed the pink-haired pedestrian, the player continues down the sidewalk toward a group of pedestrians, one holding a large dark umbrella. The corporate building facade continues along the left while a digital street sign becomes visible on the right. The scene maintains the overcast, rain-slicked cyberpunk aesthetic as the character approaches the elevated overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked futuristic sidewalk that leads from a corporate facade toward a massive elevated highway. It begins with the player character walking beside a towering building with glowing signage under a cool, hazy morning light, passing a pedestrian with distinctive pink cybernetic hair. As the character moves forward, the camera tracks past the pink-haired figure toward a group of pedestrians, including one holding a large dark umbrella. The scene then shifts focus toward a digital street sign on the right while the corporate architecture continues to line the left. Finally, the movement carries the character deeper into the overcast urban environment as they approach the looming structure of the elevated overpass.
